---
title: "Joyce Escatel-Flores"
description: "Contributor to nycOpenData and NYC Open Data Week 2026"
---

## Project

- [NYC Restaurants and Museums](../nyc-open-data-2026/03-Final-Restaurant-and-Museum-Project-Joyce.qmd)

## Links

-   [GitHub](https://github.com/JoyceEscatel)\
-   [LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/in/joyce-escatel-flores/)
